name: Hotkeys Cheatsheet
text:
── AeroSpace (Cmd = SUPER via Karabiner) ──────────────────
Cmd + 1–9 / 0       Switch workspace (10 = scratchpad)
Cmd + Shift + 1–9   Move window to workspace
Cmd + arrows        Focus window
Cmd + Shift+arrows  Move window
Cmd + Tab / S+Tab   Next / prev workspace
Cmd + W             Close window
Cmd + F             Fullscreen
Cmd + T             Toggle floating
Cmd + J             Toggle split direction
Cmd + L             Toggle layout
Cmd + - / =         Resize width
Cmd + Shift - / =   Resize height
Cmd + Enter         New Ghostty window
Cmd + Shift+Enter   New Chrome window
Cmd + Shift+N       New Zed window
Alt + Tab           Cycle windows (AltTab)

── tmux (prefix = Cmd+Space) ──────────────────────────────
prefix + h / v      Split horizontal / vertical
prefix + x / k      Kill pane / window
prefix + c          New window
prefix + r / R      Rename window / session
prefix + [          Copy mode  (v select, y copy)
Ctrl+Alt+arrows     Navigate panes
Alt + 1–9           Switch window
Alt + Left/Right    Prev / next window
